changelog: v5.3.0: v5.3.0: Centralized PostingService canonical mimarisi, sabah motivasyon ve gurupaylasimi stabilizasyonu
v5.3.0: ARCH: Canonical PostingService ile tum moduller tek dogrulanmis Playwright gonderim hattina alindi
v5.3.0: FIX: Guru paneli, sabah motivasyon ve gun sonu threadleri icin /status URL + posted_count dogrulamasi zorunlu
v5.3.0: EOD: Market_Movers.txt yukselen/dusen/hacim parser ve promptta HACIM LIDERLERI bolumu eklendi
v5.3.0: HARDEN: FanZone, Interaction, Telegram onay, History, release workflow ve persistence stabilizasyonu
v5.2.9: THREAD: Playwright thread gonderim stabilite - dogrulama, retry ve timeout 480s iyilestirmeleri
v5.2.9: NEWS: TeFo.txt dogrulanmis BIST sektor haritasi ve haber prompt sembol halusinasyon fixleri
v5.2.4: FIX: Restored robust click logic in playwright_daemon.py to prevent pointer intercept failures on replies
v5.2.3: RELEASE: LM Studio reasoning suppression, LogFileWatcher snapshot db, SymbolNormalizer integration, SocialIntel filtering, Playwright media-first posting and regex sanitization
v5.2.2: FIX: X-User fallback kaldirildi, cift @@ mention hatasi giderildi, fallback mention opsiyonel yapildi
v5.2.2: AI: Tarama kriteri baglami ve IndicatorGuide promptlara eklendi
v5.2.2: SOCIAL: Fenomen engagement skoru aktif edildi ve son tweet CTA kurali eklendi
v5.1.4: FIX: NewsAnalysis maxTokens 450->1500 (Qwen3.6-27b finish_reason=length cozuldu)
v5.1.4: FIX: CS8602 null check â€” threadContent null guard eklendi
v5.1.3: NEWS: Flash haber garantili 2-tweet akisi, BuildMinimalNewsTweet fallback
v5.1.3: FIX: LMStudio reasoning_content fallback kaldirildi (ham thinking tweet engellendi)
v5.1.3: LOG: finish_reason=length uyarisi eklendi
